race.comment: KATIM'S CLUB (3) is mixing her form but bounced back with a strong effort here two weeks ago. Cherry-ripe now and gets a key booking in Toeroek. Big chance if she can put it all together. RUBINI (11) got things back on track last start with a strong run behind JOVIALE, who he now meets 3kgs better. Drawn well in the middle and if the gaps appear can pounce on them. JOVIALE (9) can keep the ball rolling. Keeps Milnes, who should have him blending into the race sweetly again at the top of the straight. Concedes weight to a couple off his last start win but deserves consideration. CRESPIANO (2) hops over the border after knocking off the maiden at Kilmore. Has upside, though will need a smart steer from the draw. ROUSING REFRAIN (10) got off the mark stylishly first-up and has been savaging the line since. Will settle off the speed and be looking to burst through. SIR RANDOLPH (6) is going better than his form reads and with even luck in the straight he can cause a scare.
